'''âj-y-ng''' ('''kajayang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lugao|lugao]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lugao|lugao]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kajayang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijayang|thijayang]] || [[word:jijayang|jijayang]] || [[word:shijayang|shijayang]] || [[word:kijayang|kijayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujayang|thuthujayang]] || [[word:jujujayang|jujujayang]] || [[word:shushujayang|shushujayang]] || [[word:kukujayang|kukujayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujayang|thujayang]] || [[word:jujayang|jujayang]] || [[word:shujayang|shujayang]] || [[word:kujayang|kujayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujayang|thujayang]] || [[word:jujayang|jujayang]] || [[word:shujayang|shujayang]] || [[word:kujayang|kujayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejayang|thejayang]] || [[word:jejayang|jejayang]] || [[word:shejayang|shejayang]] || [[word:kejayang|kejayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojayang|thothojayang]] || [[word:jojojayang|jojojayang]] || [[word:shoshojayang|shoshojayang]] || [[word:kokojayang|kokojayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojayang|thojayang]] || [[word:jojayang|jojayang]] || [[word:shojayang|shojayang]] || [[word:kojayang|kojayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojayang|thojayang]] || [[word:jojayang|jojayang]] || [[word:shojayang|shojayang]] || [[word:kojayang|kojayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjayang|thĂŠjayang]] || [[word:jĂŠjayang|jĂŠjayang]] || [[word:shĂŠjayang|shĂŠjayang]] || [[word:kĂŠjayang|kĂŠjayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajayang|thathajayang]] || [[word:jajajayang|jajajayang]] || [[word:shashajayang|shashajayang]] || [[word:kakajayang|kakajayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajayang|thajayang]] || [[word:jajayang|jajayang]] || [[word:shajayang|shajayang]] || [[word:kajayang|kajayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajayang|thajayang]] || [[word:jajayang|jajayang]] || [[word:shajayang|shajayang]] || [[word:kajayang|kajayang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajayang|shajayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajayang|goshajayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajayang|gokishajayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajayangnĂŒ|shajayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajayangnknĂŒ|goshajayangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajayangnĂŒ|gokishajayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajayangshĂ«|shajayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajayangnkshĂ«|goshajayangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajayangshĂ«|gokishajayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajayangro|shajayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajayangnkro|goshajayangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajayangro|gokishajayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajayangmu|shajayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajayangnkmu|goshajayangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajayangmu|gokishajayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajayangsher|shajayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajayangnksher|goshajayangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajayangsher|gokishajayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajayang|shajayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajayangnkng|goshajayangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajayang|gokishajayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajayangya|shajayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajayangnkya|goshajayangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajayangya|gokishajayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajayangyam|shajayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajayangnkyam|goshajayangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajayangyam|gokishajayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajayangnĂŒshĂ«|shajayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajayangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajayangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajayangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajayangnĂŒro|shajayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajayangnknĂŒro|goshajayangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajayangnĂŒro|gokishajayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajayangnĂŒmu|shajayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajayangnknĂŒmu|goshajayangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajayangnĂŒmu|gokishajayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajayangshĂ«nĂŒ|shajayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajayangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajayangshĂ«ro|shajayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajayangnkshĂ«ro|goshajayangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajayangshĂ«ro|gokishajayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajayangshĂ«mu|shajayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajayangnkshĂ«mu|goshajayangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajayangshĂ«mu|gokishajayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajayangronĂŒ|shajayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajayangnkronĂŒ|goshajayangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajayangronĂŒ|gokishajayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajayangroshĂ«|shajayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajayangnkroshĂ«|goshajayangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajayangroshĂ«|gokishajayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajayangromu|shajayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajayangnkromu|goshajayangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajayangromu|gokishajayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajayangmunĂŒ|shajayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajayangnkmunĂŒ|goshajayangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajayangmunĂŒ|gokishajayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajayangmushĂ«|shajayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajayangnkmushĂ«|goshajayangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajayangmushĂ«|gokishajayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajayangmuro|shajayangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajayangnkmuro|goshajayangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajayangmuro|gokishajayangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
